name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Programming Environment
notes: This Building Block triggers when a programming environment such as cmd or powershell is detected.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Programming Environment on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created

when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'powershell.exe' OR ("IMP Hash" is not NULL and "IMP Hash" in ('5A87D2858188870B4DAD9DD3F3158173', '099B747A4A31983374E54912D4BB7C44', 'F2C0E8A5BD10DBC167455484050CD683', 'CAEE994F79D85E47C06E5FA9CDEAE453')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Programming Environment on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created

AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'powershell.exe' OR ("IMP Hash" is not NULL and "IMP Hash" in ('5A87D2858188870B4DAD9DD3F3158173', '099B747A4A31983374E54912D4BB7C44', 'F2C0E8A5BD10DBC167455484050CD683', 'CAEE994F79D85E47C06E5FA9CDEAE453')) AQL filter query
